text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
201 
GAP_TIER_06 
LABEL: 
Gap Coverage on Tier 6 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether or not the Part D plan offers some cost sharing in the coverage gap for 
this tier. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_TIER_06 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 = Not Applicable 
X = Unknown 

COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2008.
